faqs.question: Do you accommodate dietary restrictions?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer vegetarian, vegan, gluten-free, and allergen-aware options. Please inform us when booking.

faqs.question: Is there parking available?
faqs.answer: Yes, complimentary valet parking is available on weekends. Street parking is available on weekdays.

faqs.question: Do you accept walk-ins?
faqs.answer: We welcome walk-ins based on availability. Reservations are strongly recommended on weekends.

faqs.question: Can I bring my own wine?
faqs.answer: Corkage is available at $25 per bottle for special occasions.

faqs.question: Do you offer gift certificates?
faqs.answer: Yes, available in any denomination at the restaurant or online.
